question: [File: 'File Name: common/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/common/domain/transaction/Transaction.java -> Scope: Critical: Network not being able to confirm new transactions (total network shutdown)'] [Function: addItemizedTransfer()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the lack of thread-safety in the `itemizedTransfer` ArrayList (line 116) by submitting concurrent transactions that race to call `addItemizedTransfer()`, causing a `ConcurrentModificationException` that crashes the importer and halts all transaction confirmation?
